name: Modal
description: DEPTH BUILD Stage A/B fixture — a minimal, axis-free Modal contract used only to drive portal-aware capture + multi-root anatomy over the real @shopify/polaris Modal. It carries no styling of its own (an empty root); the promoted multi-root anatomy is produced entirely from the computed-floor capture. NOT a census component and NOT wired into extract/computed/configs/polaris.json.
